title: Check authorized SSH keys on the VM

log.context: Check authorized SSH keys on the VM

Done. Posted to Discord. Summary of findings:

- `~/.ssh/authorized_keys` has 3 entries (4 lines, one duplicate):
  1. An `ssh-rsa` key with no comment/identifier
  2. `ssh-ed25519` for `jhead@jxh.io` — listed twice (duplicate)
  3. `ssh-rsa` for `me@centronias.com`
- No `/root/.ssh/authorized_keys` exists
- The VM also has its own outbound `id_ed25519` keypair in `~/.ssh/`
